rationale: The citing paper’s central mechanism is a resource-depletion account (including a temperature × ego-depletion experiment and System 1 reliance), which closely overlaps with the cited paper’s core contribution that executive resource depletion shifts consumer choice toward more intuitive/context effects. Given this strong construct and mechanism alignment—and a confirmed DOI-level reference match—this is plausibly a substantive theory/mechanism source rather than an incidental mention.
